title: Amtech M0900 150mm (6") Junior Hacksaw
features: LIGHTWEIGHT: This junior hacksaw has a lightweight, chrome plated frame with a finger guard and comes with a 150mm (6"), 32 TPI fine-toothed blade
ACCEPTS MOST BLADES: It accepts all standard 150mm (6") fine-toothed blades
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 6" Junior Hacksaw Frame See more
